framework.name: Rate Range Strategy with Project-Specific Adjustment
framework.description: Most successful consultants establish rate range (e.g., $150-400/hour) rather than fixed rate, then adjust within range based on project competitiveness, client budget signals, and whether it's repeat project across networks. Flexibility beats rate optimization for total earnings.
framework.raw_quote: The most successful consultants are willing to change their rate to increase their chances of client selection... I would recommend coming up with a consulting rate range, for example $150 – $400/hour, and be willing to take projects that fall within that range.

source.title: Setting Your Expert Network Consulting Rate • Expert Opportunities
